steps.message: Ceeline compact transport is available. For internal AI-to-AI communication (handoffs, summaries, memory notes, routing), use the Ceeline skill to encode payloads into token-efficient compact format. Never emit raw compact text or Ceeline envelope JSON in user-facing output. Use detect_ceeline_leak before any user-visible rendering.

steps.description: Block rendering if Ceeline artifacts are present in user-facing output
